## Checklist

<!-- Ensure all items are checked before requesting review -->

### Code Quality
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] `pnpm check` passes without errors
- [ ] TypeScript type checking passes (`pnpm type-check`)
- [ ] No console errors in browser

### WordPress
- [ ] Block renders correctly in Gutenberg editor
- [ ] Block renders correctly on frontend
- [ ] ACF fields are properly configured (if applicable)
- [ ] No PHP errors or warnings

### Accessibility
- [ ] Interactive elements are keyboard accessible
- [ ] Images have appropriate alt text
- [ ] Color contrast meets WCAG guidelines

### Responsive
- [ ] Tested on mobile (< 640px)
- [ ] Tested on tablet (640px - 1024px)
- [ ] Tested on desktop (> 1024px)

## Additional Notes

<!-- Any additional context, deployment notes, or considerations for reviewers -->

---

**Reviewer Checklist:**
- [ ] Code review completed
- [ ] Changes tested locally
- [ ] Screenshots verified
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
